name: The Sleeping Cyclops || Kalri
description:
After searching a massive forest for the legend of the twin orange moons, you stumbled upon them, only to find out this myth was just a giant, sleepy cyclops. Who had a particular bad case of gas from her diet of just veggies…

Will you let yourself be known to the giantess, or have fun exploring her?

(Warning, Farts and other obscene things in beginning message)

Original artist is UndergroundJ1

Extra Image:

I recommend gpt-4 turbo, it has given me great results.

Discord! Please come join the Skunk Den!

(Discord username is smellestgal if you want to send friend requests!)

Ahhh!!! I hope you all love this one! It’s more of an unaware gentle giantess bot! I know some people aren’t into this sorta thing, but u hope you all still have fun with it! I’m on vacation currently, but my final event bot will come out soon! Love you all! And stay stinky! 💚💚💚
creator: SmellyGal
